home.heroTitle: Find the right job across Uzbekistan
home.heroBadge: Jobs near you · on the map
home.mapTitle: Jobs near you — on the map
home.mapLead: Tap a pin: salary, schedule, distance — and apply in 2 clicks.

homeFaq.heading: Frequently asked questions
homeFaq.a1: Yollla is a mobile-first job marketplace for Uzbekistan. Every posting shows salary, schedule, and contract type up front, and applications go through in two taps. The focus is blue-collar and mass-hiring roles.
homeFaq.q2: Do I need to sign up to search for jobs?
homeFaq.a2: No. As a guest you can browse listings, apply filters, and even start filling in an application. Sign-in is only requested at the final click, and anything you typed is restored afterwards.
homeFaq.a3: On any job page, tap "Apply — 2 clicks". If you already have a résumé it goes straight to the employer; if not, you'll create a short one first. Employers usually reply within a few days.
homeFaq.a4: Tashkent, Samarkand, Andijan, Fergana, Namangan, Bukhara, Khorezm, and other regional capitals. The full list is on the home page under "By city" and on the map view.
homeFaq.a5: Every listing shows the salary in Uzbek som ("2 500 000 – 4 000 000 so'm") with a gross / net tag. Where an employer chose "negotiable", the number is discussed at the interview.
homeFaq.q6: How do I create a résumé?
homeFaq.a6: Use "Create résumé" — a step-by-step form covering personal details, experience, education, and contacts. An AI assistant can draft the "About me" section. The résumé is saved and attached to every application.
homeFaq.q7: Is Yollla free for job seekers?
homeFaq.a7: Yes — search, applications, saved searches, and messaging are all free for seekers. Employers also get their first vacancy free; further listings pick a per-listing tier (Standard / Brand / Premium).

landingFaq.heading: About {category} jobs
landingFaq.q1: How do I find the best {category} openings?
landingFaq.a1: The list on this page is the current set of open {category} vacancies. Each card shows salary, schedule, and contract type — pick one and use "Apply — 2 clicks".
landingFaq.q2: What's the average salary for a {category}?
landingFaq.a2: Pay varies by experience, city, and employer. See the exact numbers on each posting above — every card carries a real range.
landingFaq.q3: Can I get a {category} job without prior experience?
landingFaq.a3: Yes — many postings are open to "no experience" and entry-level candidates. Filter by "Experience: none" or "Entry" to see only those.
landingFaq.a4: Scroll to the "By city" block below to open the city-specific list — Tashkent, Samarkand, Andijan and others.
landingFaq.q5: What documents do I need for a {category} job?
landingFaq.a5: Usually a passport copy plus, where relevant, a diploma or certificate. Some roles need a medical clearance or a driver's licence — that's listed under "Requirements" on the posting.
landingFaq.q6: What's the difference between an official contract and a GPH?
landingFaq.a6: An official contract is a full labour-code employment agreement (tax, leave, social insurance). GPH is a civil-law contract, simpler and good for one-off work. Every posting shows which type it is.
landingFaq.a7: Every day. New postings appear on this page the moment an employer publishes them — no manual moderation. Subscribe via "Saved searches" to catch new ones early.

landingPage.metaDescriptionCategory: Open {category} vacancies with salary, schedule, and two-tap apply. Yollla — the trusted job marketplace of Uzbekistan.
landingPage.metaDescriptionCategoryCity: {category} vacancies in {city} — salary, schedule, and apply in two taps. New listings on Yollla every day.
landingPage.introCategory: Today's open {category} vacancies in one feed. Salary, schedule, contract type — all on the card. Apply in two taps, no signup.
landingPage.introCategoryCity: {category} jobs in {city}: nearby vacancies, clear pay, verified employers — on Yollla.
landingPage.empty: No open vacancies here yet — new listings will show up soon.
landingPage.seoBlockBody: Yollla lists {category} openings straight from employers. Every card carries real salary, schedule, contract type (official / GPH), experience requirement, and contact info. Use the map to pick a spot closest to you and check the company rating before you apply.

meta.title: yollla — the jobs map
meta.description: Work close to home on one map. Salary, schedule, distance, and apply in two clicks.

hero.title: Work close to home
hero.subtitle: Every job in the city on one map. Point at a pin or tap it — salary, schedule, distance — and apply in two clicks, no résumé.

map.title: Distance is factor #1
map.body: For a salesperson, courier or waiter the main question isn't “what job” but “where”. An hour's commute eats your pay and your energy. Listing feeds ignore this — we make distance the basis of the search.
map.hint: Point at a pin or tap it — the vacancy opens
map.feedBody: Where is it? Unknown. Hundreds of identical rows.
map.mapBody: You see it at once: this one is a 10-minute walk.

open.title: Open the map
open.body: No sign-up, no résumé. You instantly see who's hiring near your home.

filter.title: Filter
filter.body: Field, salary, schedule and a “near me” radius — only what you need remains.

apply.title: Apply in two clicks
apply.body: Name and phone — that's it. The employer gets your application straight to Telegram.

employers.title: A vacancy on the map — in 3 minutes
employers.body: No managers, no drawn-out approvals: you fill the form — your pin is already on your district's map.

points.area: Candidates from your own district — they actually reach the interview
points.telegram: Applications straight to Telegram: name and phone
points.pay: Pay with Payme or Click, an invoice for companies

reputation.title: “Flowers and flies” — reputation on the map
reputation.body: Job seekers see where they're going to work before they even call. Only those actually hired through yollla can rate.

steps.s1: Hired through yollla → taps “I got the job”
steps.s2: After 30 days a bot asks 3 questions: paid on time, conditions matched, would you recommend
steps.s3: The rating shows right on the pin: flowers and bees — or flies

reputation.note: The “I got the job” button — from day one · the map rating — from month 4–6

pricing.title: Cheaper than one day of downtime
pricing.note: Only employers pay. For job seekers — free forever.
pricing.footnote: Prices are a launch estimate, subject to refinement

comparison.title: For them the map is a feature. For us — the product

rows.map: Map as the basis of search

economics.title: Simple economics
economics.body: Employers pay. For job seekers — free forever: that is the engine that grows the base and the applications.

telegram.title: For vacancy channels
telegram.body: We'll put your listings on the map with a source credit: a convenient format for the audience, traffic and new subscribers for you.

business.title: For the first 50 businesses
business.body: Retail, food service, services, warehouses. Before launch we post your vacancies for free and personally help set up your cabinet.

contact.title: We launch in Tashkent
contact.body: Autumn 2026. The first employers post for free before launch and get the founder's personal support.
contact.author: Jamshid Fayziyev · Tashkent

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and data
settings.deleteWarning: Deleting your account is permanent. Your profile, resume, applications, messages and any other data will be removed and cannot be restored. Any companies you own will remain but will be marked orphaned.
settings.deleteReasonPlaceholder: Tell us why you're leaving — it helps us improve.
